Table of Contents

Interface IOverviewItemURI

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control an overview item URI.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("7061751B-3279-4719-86DF-BDFF9C73C809")]
public interface IOverviewItemURI

Properties

DatasetExists

Indicates whether the overview raster dataset exists in the storage location.

bool DatasetExists { get; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

IsManagedDataset

Indicates whether the mosaic dataset manages the lifetime of the overview raster dataset. Raster datasets associated with managed overview items are moved, copied, and deleted along with the parent mosaic dataset.

bool IsManagedDataset { get; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

ItemName

Name of the overview item.

string ItemName { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

NativeExtent

The original extent of the overview item URI.

IEnvelope NativeExtent { get; set; }

Property Value

IEnvelope

Examples

Sample Snippet

RasterInfo

The RasterInfo object describing a dummy overview tile.

IRasterInfo RasterInfo { get; set; }

Property Value

IRasterInfo

Examples

Sample Snippet

StorageName

Name of the storage location for the overview raster dataset.

IName StorageName { get; set; }

Property Value

IName

Examples

Sample Snippet

TileColOffset

The column offset of the overview tile in the grid.

int TileColOffset { get; set; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

TileRowOffset

The row offset of the overview tile in the grid.

int TileRowOffset { get; set; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

Methods

DeleteDataset()

Deletes the overview raster dataset.

void DeleteDataset()

Examples
